Natural Peanut Butter Crunch – A Perfect Blend of Taste & Nutrition!

You will enjoy the rich, nutty crunch of Alpino Natural Peanut Butter Crunch, which is made from 100% premium roasted peanuts that have not been added with any sugar, salt, or preservatives. Fitness enthusiasts, athletes, and peanut butter lovers will enjoy this peanut butter, which contains high protein, fibre, and healthy fats. This tasty snack is made to balance taste, texture, and nutrition in every spoonful. Whether fuelling your workouts, keeping a healthy lifestyle, or simply enjoying peanut butter, Alpino Natural Peanut Butter Crunch is the perfect gluten-free snack.

  • 100% Natural & Pure – Only roasted peanuts produce this product.
  • Rich in Protein – Supports muscle growth and recovery by containing 30 grams of protein per 100 grams.
  • Crunchy & Satisfying – Enjoy the perfect peanut chunks in every bite.
  • Versatile & Delicious – Spread it, blend it, bake with it, or eat it straight from the jar!

How to Enjoy Alpino Natural Peanut Butter Crunch?

- Spread it on toast for a delicious and protein-rich breakfast.
- Pair it with fruits such as bananas or apples to make a nutritious snack.
- Blend it into smoothies for a rich and creamy taste.
- Use it in baking healthy treats such as protein bars and cookies.
- Enjoy it straight from the jar because you deserve tasty and healthy treat!

Made with Quality & Care

Alpino is committed to offering premium-quality peanut butter manufactured in a facility that is ISO 22000 certified and FSSAI approved. Our jars are freshly made with only the finest ingredients, ensuring that you and your family enjoy the best taste and nutrition possible.

✅ Manufactured in a certified facility
✅ Freshly made in India
✅ Suitable for all age groups

Shelf Life: 9 months in Refrigerator

I have used Alpino peanut butter first time, It has so crunchy almond which i love, and it has awesome test having low sugar. Really nice taste with sandwich. It has high reach nutrition. If you’re looking for a healthy, protein-rich, and preservative-free option, Alpino Peanut Butter is definitely worth trying. It’s fresh, crunchy, and absolutely delicious, with a rich roasted flavor that makes every bite satisfying.

Kabir

This is by far the best natural peanut butter I’ve ever had. You can taste the authentic quality of the roasted Junagadh peanuts in every spoonful. It’s rich, nutty, and perfectly crunchy. What I love most is the purity: no sugar, no salt, no palm oil. Just simple, wholesome goodness that feels great to eat.

Alpino Natural Peanut Butter Crunch is not just tasty, it’s healthy too! Made from 100% roasted peanuts with no added sugar or salt, it’s the cleanest snack I’ve found. With 30g of protein, it fuels my workouts and keeps me guilt-free every time I grab a spoonful!
